decisions.title: adopt Loki + Grafana for centralized log aggregation
decisions.rationale: Loki chosen over ELK Stack (high resource overhead, operational complexity) and Datadog Logs (estimated $4,200/month, exceeds budget). Loki integrates natively with existing Grafana deployment and has significantly lower resource requirements.
evidence: ELK: requires ~6 CPU cores, 24 GB RAM per node; high operational complexity
Datadog Logs: estimated $4,200/month at current log volume — exceeds infrastructure budget
Loki: lower resource overhead; integrates with existing Grafana instance; label-based indexing sufficient
